NIBSDescription: Single- and paired-pulse (SICI) TMS over left M1 with concurrent EMG from the right first dorsal interosseous. Conditioning pulse dosed at 70% rMT; test pulse dosed to evoke a ~1 mV MEP.

IntensitySet.Criterion: MEP amplitude >= 50 uV in at least 5 of 10 consecutive trials
IntensitySet.MeasurementMethod: EMG MEP from right first dorsal interosseous

IntensitySet.Criterion: stimulator output evoking a ~1 mV peak-to-peak MEP
IntensitySet.MeasurementMethod: EMG MEP from right first dorsal interosseous

nibs_event_id.Description: Identifier of a stimulation event type with a unique parameter set. Linked to nibs_event_id in *_events.tsv. MUST be unique within this file.

stimulator_id.Description: Device generating the waveform. Links to StimulatorSet.StimulatorID.

nibs_element_id.Description: Element delivering stimulation. Links to ElementSet.ElementID.

stimulus_shape.Description: Waveform shape of the base stimulus.

Levels.Monophasic: Monophasic pulse as per stimulator setting

first_inflection.Description: Direction of the first deflection of the induced current.

current_direction.Description: Direction of current flow in the coil winding, read with the coil in the calibration-block orientation (stimulating face away from the viewer, top face toward the viewer, handle or leading edge pointing away). cl and co apply to circular coils; cl-co and co-cl apply to figure-of-eight coils and name the left wing then the right wing.

Levels.cl: Circular coil, single winding, current clockwise
Levels.co: Circular coil, single winding, current counterclockwise
Levels.cl-co: Figure-of-eight coil, left wing clockwise, right wing counterclockwise
Levels.co-cl: Figure-of-eight coil, left wing counterclockwise, right wing clockwise
Levels.other: Coil geometry not covered by cl/co/cl-co/co-cl; the actual current flow is described in this text

stimulus_intensity.Description: Delivered amplitude of the base stimulus. n/a when intensity varies between pulses (values then in pattern1_intensity).

stimulus_duration.Description: Pulse width (contiguous non-zero current through the coil).

pattern1_count.Description: Number of base stimuli in one pattern1 unit.

pattern1_interval.Description: Onset-to-onset interval between consecutive base stimuli.

pattern1_intensity.Description: Delivered amplitude of each successive stimulus in pattern1. Number of values equals pattern1_count.

intensity_reference.Description: Anchor used to set the intensity. Links to IntensitySet.IntensityID. Closed vocabulary (rMT, aMT, 1mV, e-field, absolute). Aligned to pattern1_intensity when delimited.

intensity_scaling.Description: Multiplier applied to the reference value, or 'absolute' for a directly specified value. Aligned to intensity_reference.
